---
title: "Cityscapes"
---

![](/images/IMG_3641.jpg)

Golden Gate Bridge, San Francisco, CA

![](/images/IMG_4115.jpg)

The Painted Ladies/Downtown, San Francisco, CA

![](/images/IMG_1456.jpg)

Lake Merritt, Oakland, CA

![](images/clipboard-2692775094.jpeg)

Washington State Capitol Building, Olympia, WA

![](/images/IMG_9735.jpg)

Kyoto, Japan
